title: AI-based Crop Disease Detection for Smallholder Farmers
description: Develop a mobile application that uses on-device machine learning to identify crop diseases from leaf images, even in low-connectivity rural areas. The solution should work offline, support regional languages, and suggest locally available remedies.
organization: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare

title: Blockchain-based Land Record Verification System
description: Design a tamper-proof land registry system using blockchain to reduce fraud in property transactions. The system should integrate with existing state land record databases and provide a citizen-facing verification portal.

title: IoT-based Smart Irrigation for Water Conservation
description: Build a low-cost IoT sensor network that monitors soil moisture and weather conditions to automate irrigation scheduling, reducing water wastage in agriculture. Solution should be affordable for small-scale farmers.

title: Build a Real-time Collaborative Code Editor
description: Create a web-based collaborative code editor similar to Google Docs but for developers. Support multiple cursors, syntax highlighting for 20+ languages, real-time sync via WebSockets, and integrated terminal. Target audience: remote pair programming teams.

title: AI-Powered Resume Screener for Recruiters
description: Build an ML-powered tool that parses resumes, extracts key skills and experience, and matches candidates to job descriptions. Provide a ranking system and explainable AI to show why a candidate was matched.

title: Decentralized Crowdfunding Platform for Social Causes
description: Develop a blockchain-based crowdfunding platform where donors can track exactly how their money is used. Implement smart contracts for milestone-based fund releases and provide transparent reporting.

title: Voice-Controlled Home Automation for Elderly
description: Create a voice-first home automation system designed for elderly users. Support multiple Indian languages, integrate with existing smart home devices, and include fall detection and emergency alerts using ML.

title: Real-time Air Quality Monitoring Network
description: Design a low-cost air quality monitoring system using IoT sensors that can be deployed across a city. Data should be visualized on a public dashboard with ML-based pollution forecasting.
